name: GAT Layer
description: Graph Attention Network layer: attention-weighted message passing over adjacency
code:
_gat{{_id}}_h = {{n_heads}}
_gat{{_id}}_od = {{out_features}}
_gat{{_id}}_hd = _gat{{_id}}_od // _gat{{_id}}_h
_gat{{_id}}_W = np.random.randn(_gat{{_id}}_h, {{in_features}}, _gat{{_id}}_hd).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_gat{{_id}}_a_src = np.random.randn(_gat{{_id}}_h, _gat{{_id}}_hd, 1).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_gat{{_id}}_a_dst = np.random.randn(_gat{{_id}}_h, _gat{{_id}}_hd, 1).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_gat{{_id}}_N = {{features}}.shape[-2]
# Project features per head: (N, in) -> (heads, N, hd)
_gat{{_id}}_Wh = np.einsum('...ni,hio->...hno', {{features}}, _gat{{_id}}_W)
# Attention scores
_gat{{_id}}_e_src = np.matmul(_gat{{_id}}_Wh, _gat{{_id}}_a_src).squeeze(-1)
_gat{{_id}}_e_dst = np.matmul(_gat{{_id}}_Wh, _gat{{_id}}_a_dst).squeeze(-1)
_gat{{_id}}_e = _gat{{_id}}_e_src[..., :, None] + _gat{{_id}}_e_dst[..., None, :]
_gat{{_id}}_e = 0.2 * _gat{{_id}}_e  # LeakyReLU negative slope
np.maximum(_gat{{_id}}_e, _gat{{_id}}_e * 0.2, out=_gat{{_id}}_e)
# Mask by adjacency
_gat{{_id}}_mask = ({{adjacency}} == 0)
_gat{{_id}}_e = np.where(_gat{{_id}}_mask, -1e9, _gat{{_id}}_e)
# Softmax attention
_gat{{_id}}_exp = np.exp(_gat{{_id}}_e - np.max(_gat{{_id}}_e, axis=-1, keepdims=True))
_gat{{_id}}_alpha = _gat{{_id}}_exp / (np.sum(_gat{{_id}}_exp, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + 1e-9)
# Aggregate
_gat{{_id}}_out = np.matmul(_gat{{_id}}_alpha, _gat{{_id}}_Wh)
# Concat heads: (..., heads, N, hd) -> (..., N, heads*hd)
{{output}} = _gat{{_id}}_out.transpose(0, 2, 1, 3).reshape(-1, _gat{{_id}}_N, _gat{{_id}}_od) if _gat{{_id}}_out.ndim == 4 else _gat{{_id}}_out.reshape(_gat{{_id}}_N, _gat{{_id}}_od)
